name: Espresso
description: Rich, bold, and perfectly pulled from single-origin beans.
alt: Freshly pulled espresso shot in a small cup

name: Cappuccino
description: Velvety steamed milk layered over a double shot of espresso.
alt: Cappuccino with thick steamed milk foam and latte art

name: Latte
description: Smooth and creamy, our most popular drink morning or afternoon.
alt: Creamy cafe latte in a ceramic cup

name: Cold Brew
description: Steeped for 18 hours for a smooth, low-acid iced coffee.
alt: Cold brew coffee served over ice

name: Butter Croissant
description: Flaky, golden layers of hand-laminated French pastry.
alt: Golden butter croissant with flaky layers

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Baked fresh daily with real blueberries and lemon zest.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked with creamy oat milk.
alt: Bright green matcha latte in a mug

name: Chai Latte
description: Spiced black tea blend with steamed milk and cinnamon.
